joinCode.title: Join a session
joinCode.subtitle: It's on the screen in front of you
joinCode.label: Enter code
joinCode.helper: Enter the 4-digit code shown on the screen
joinCode.error.server: Something went wrong — try again later
nameStepRequired: The presenter has made names mandatory.
nameStepOptional: Optional — you can also participate anonymously.
gdprConsent: I agree to the processing of my name for session analytics. Data is stored per your host's plan and deleted as described in the Privacy Policy.
waitingHostSub: Please wait until the host starts the session on their screen. This page updates automatically.
sessionNotFoundJoin: We could not find this session.
waitingForPresenter: Waiting for the presenter to start the session
lockedSub: The presenter will open voting shortly.
duplicateVote: Your vote could not be submitted — you have already voted on this question.
predictionSub: Choose the option you think will be chosen the most.
predictionReveal: The presenter will reveal the result shortly.
captionSub: Be creative — the funniest answer wins!
guest.inviteUsed: This invitation is no longer valid or has already been used.
consentWait: Wait for the facilitator to discuss the results.
consentObjectionPlaceholder: Why does this decision block our progress or is it harmful?
consentObjectionHint: This will be shared anonymously with the group to improve consensus.
connectionErrorSub: Connection lost. Reload the page to rejoin.
